label: Mammafiore
rootCause: Pass C misreads the IVA column (6,00) as line_total_net instead of the Valor column (10,86). The €4.86 residual is exactly Valor − IVA. v29 reproduces this on 4/5 stability runs; unit_price is stably copied as the net/discounted amount (10.86) rather than list Pr. Unitário (15.192), but that field mismatch has €0 financial impact when Valor is correct.

rejected.A_discount_extraction: Desc. 28,50% is not extracted, but the €4.86 error is driven by total=6 (IVA), not missing discount math.
rejected.C_row_bleed: Wrong value (6,00) comes from the same row's IVA cell, not a neighbouring row's Valor.
rejected.D_only: Failure mode when wrong is deterministic (IVA bleed); 1/5 runs succeed with correct Valor 10.86.

euroMathTrace.verification: extractedTotal equals printed IVA column 6,00 — not Valor 10,86
euroMathTrace.discountCheck: 15.192 × (1 − 0.285) = 10.862 ≈ 10.86 — discount math is correct on invoice; extraction never reaches it because total is wrong column

gross_unit_price.note: Net/discounted unit confused with list Pr. Unitário; €0 financial impact when total correct

discount_pct.note: Secondary field gap; not the €4.86 driver

discountLineAudit5Run.note: Historical probes rarely hit €6; v27+ residual runs introduced IVA-bleed failure mode

recommendedPromptOnlyFix.location: After existing Rulo pack-notation example (~lines 163–165), before Baladin Ginger Beer block
recommendedPromptOnlyFix.smallestChange: Add MAMMAFIORE COLUMN ISOLATION block: Pr. Unitário | Desc. | IVA | Valor → gross_unit_price | discount_pct | (ignore IVA) | line_total_net, with Rulo negative example showing line_total_net: 6.00 (BAD — IVA) vs 10.86 (GOOD — Valor).
recommendedPromptOnlyFix.expectedRecoveryNote: Per failed run; v29 avg €3.89 across 5 runs implies ~80% failure rate at €4.86
